import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def read_sql(name):
    return (ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="ascii")


def make_db():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON")
    db.executescript(
        """
        CREATE TABLE registry_object (
            object_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            object_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (object_kind IN ('supplier', 'depot')),
            display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            established_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            synced_at TEXT NOT NULL
        );
        CREATE TABLE registry_binding (
            binding_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            object_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES registry_object(object_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            binding_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
            binding_value TEXT NOT NULL,
            expires_at TEXT
        );
        """
    )
    return db


def refresh(db, file_name, object_id, display_name, established_at, synced_at):
    return db.execute(
        read_sql(file_name),
        {
            "object_id": object_id,
            "display_name": display_name,
            "established_at": established_at,
            "synced_at": synced_at,
        },
    )


def test_repeated_supplier_sync_updates_metadata_without_replacing_links():
    db = make_db()
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_object VALUES ('supplier-8', 'supplier', 'Original', '2022-02-02T02:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')"
    )
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO registry_binding VALUES (?, 'supplier-8', 'contract', ?, NULL)",
        [(10, "net-15"), (11, "priority")],
    )

    first = refresh(
        db,
        "refresh_supplier.sql",
        "supplier-8",
        "First Name",
        "2026-07-12T08:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-12T08:00:00Z",
    )
    second = refresh(
        db,
        "refresh_supplier.sql",
        "supplier-8",
        "Final Name",
        "2026-07-12T09:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-12T09:00:00Z",
    )

    assert (first.rowcount, second.rowcount) == (1, 1)
    assert db.execute("SELECT display_name, established_at, synced_at FROM registry_object").fetchone() == (
        "Final Name",
        "2022-02-02T02:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-12T09:00:00Z",
    )
    assert db.execute("SELECT binding_id, binding_value FROM registry_binding ORDER BY binding_id").fetchall() == [
        (10, "net-15"),
        (11, "priority"),
    ]


def test_depot_sync_composes_with_explicit_binding_expiry():
    db = make_db()
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO registry_object VALUES ('depot-9', 'depot', 'Central', '2021-06-03T06:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')"
    )
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO registry_binding VALUES (?, 'depot-9', 'route', ?, ?)",
        [
            (20, "retired", "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z"),
            (21, "overnight", None),
        ],
    )

    refreshed = refresh(
        db,
        "refresh_depot.sql",
        "depot-9",
        "Central Annex",
        "2026-07-12T10:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-12T10:00:00Z",
    )
    expired = db.execute(
        read_sql("expire_registry_bindings.sql"),
        {"cutoff": "2026-07-01T00:00:00Z"},
    )

    assert (refreshed.rowcount, expired.rowcount) == (1, 1)
    assert db.execute("SELECT display_name, established_at, synced_at FROM registry_object").fetchone() == (
        "Central Annex",
        "2021-06-03T06:00:00Z",
        "2026-07-12T10:00:00Z",
    )
    assert db.execute("SELECT binding_id, binding_value FROM registry_binding").fetchall() == [
        (21, "overnight")
    ]
